query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalWorks,
  COUNT(DISTINCT phaseId) as totalPhases,
  COUNT(DISTINCT seriesName) as totalSeries,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN featured = 1 THEN 1 END) as featuredWorks,
  MIN(dateCreated) as earliestWork,
  MAX(dateCreated) as latestWork
FROM works;
